title: Community-Led Product Feedback Loop
problem_or_desire: Difficulty getting honest, actionable feedback from early users
core_concept: A platform that incentivizes community members to perform specific usability tests
proposed_approach: A task-based reward system where users earn credits for completing recorded walkthroughs
prototype_scope: A Google Form-based system that connects testers with product links

title: Community Moderation Firewall
target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities
problem_or_desire: Managing community quality during organic spikes of paid users joining chat rooms
core_concept: Threshold filtering allowing new user interactions after passing specific introductory checklist requirements
proposed_approach: Gated room architecture that auto-clears users as members provide identity verification/intro requirements
prototype_scope: Set of manual invite workflow gate protocols installed for three specific private Discord communities

title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
core_concept: Constraint-based scheduling that prioritizes project milestones over availability.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to define 'critical blocks' and suggests rescheduling based on project milestones.
prototype_scope: A calendar plugin that lets users tag meetings as 'milestone-critical' and suggests moving non-critical meetings if conflicts arise. | Define milestone-critical tags; Build calendar API integration; Implement conflict detection; Create suggestion engine

title: Echo-Location Puzzler
problem_or_desire: Lack of accessible high-fidelity puzzle games
core_concept: A game played entirely through spatial audio cues
proposed_approach: Use binaural recording techniques to create a 3D soundscape where players navigate mazes by listening to wall reflections
prototype_scope: A single level demonstrating navigation through a 3D audio environment using touch-to-move controls

title: Micro-History Architect
problem_or_desire: Desire to visualize historical urban changes
core_concept: An AR game that overlays historical architectural blueprints onto current city streets
proposed_approach: Use device camera and geolocation to anchor 3D models of historical buildings over modern ruins
prototype_scope: A single AR view of one historical building model anchored to a specific GPS coordinate

title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
core_concept: Mapping regulatory changes to internal SOPs using diff identification.
proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to upload new regulations and existing SOPs, then highlights potential areas of conflict.
prototype_scope: A web tool where users paste text from a regulation and an SOP, and the tool highlights keywords that appear in both. | Define keyword mapping; Build text comparison engine; Create simple UI; Test with sample regulations

title: Affiliate Onboarding Concierge
problem_or_desire: Zero experience or manual friction in onboarding new affiliate partners
core_concept: Templatized automated workflow setup for new creator partnerships
proposed_approach: Service-as-software; human-managed onboarding docs paired with recurring CRM templates
prototype_scope: Onboarding document templates plus a 3-video 'how to setup' training suite

title: Inventory Reorder Agent
problem_or_desire: Balancing inventory levels to avoid stockouts without over-ordering and tying up cash.
core_concept: An agent that predicts demand based on historical sales and seasonality, then drafts purchase orders.
proposed_approach: Time-series forecasting combined with automated email generation for suppliers.
prototype_scope: A script that analyzes 6 months of sales data and generates a draft purchase order for the top 5 low-stock items.

title: RepairRiddle
problem_or_desire: Vetting the legitimacy and relevancy of massive amounts of instructional media
core_concept: Annotation map on exploded parts-view images.
proposed_approach: A tool where users can upload an image and add hotspots to identify parts.
prototype_scope: A web interface for uploading an image and adding clickable hotspots. | Build image upload; Implement hotspot creation; Add text annotation to hotspots

title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
core_concept: Ranking candidates based on public technical content production.
proposed_approach: A tool that scrapes public contribution histories and grades them based on a predefined rubric.
prototype_scope: A script that takes a GitHub/StackOverflow profile and outputs a score based on frequency and complexity of contributions. | Define scoring rubric; Build scraper for one platform; Implement scoring logic; Create simple report
